title: wedelia riedelii
intro: Wedelia riedelii, also known as False Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Wedelia riedelii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support wound healing, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve digestive health. Wedelia riedelii can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
